allowedRoyaltyCollections(address).notice: Collections allowed to act as royalty seats (NPCs now, optional Forge NFTs later).

defaultInputToken().notice: Default ERC20 address used when a recipe's inputToken is zero (typically NGT).

defaultRoyaltyCollection().notice: Default royalty collection used when caller does not explicitly specify one.

feeRouter().notice: Address that receives or routes protocol fees.

feeToken().notice: ERC20 used for protocol fees (may match inputToken or differ, e.g., APE).

forgeName(address).notice: Optional human-readable names for creator forges.

maxBatchSize().notice: Maximum allowed batch size for craftBatch.

nextRecipeId().notice: Next recipe id to use (starts at 0, first recipe is 1).

positionRoyaltySeat(uint256).notice: Royalty seat per Forge position (positionId => NFT collection + tokenId).

positions(uint256).notice: Position metadata keyed by ForgePosition721 tokenId.

positionsToken().notice: Address of the ForgePosition721 contract used for position ownership.

totalInputByRecipe(uint256).notice: Aggregate input locked per recipe id.

totalInputLocked().notice: Total amount of input tokens locked across all positions.

totalPositionsByRecipe(uint256).notice: Aggregate positions created per recipe id.

userActivePositions(address).notice: Number of active positions per user.
